libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Use local Vert.x HttpServer/WebClient tests for coverage; do not require external network services. Ensure nativeTest/runtime execution for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 sets -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true, e.g. extend the existing 5.0.0 nativeTest runtimeArgs guard to include 5.0.1.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves io.netty 4.2.2.Final through vertx-core; omitting the JDK 25 unsafe-access properties may keep native-image runtime tests failing despite valid metadata.
OAuth2WebClient coverage would require the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 dependency, but core meaningful WebClient coverage does not require it.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage; loopback HTTP tests are enough. However, the resolved 5.0.1 runtime still pulls Netty 4.2.x, so native-image runs on JDK 25 need the same Netty unsafe-access system properties already used for 5.0.0.
